scope: Wave 6 quality-first Swahili registry promotion. Page copy was not edited.
screeningCriteria: meta description exists and is substantial
visible copy is usable Swahili, not an English-heavy card/panel surface
English-only app/source bridges are honestly labeled or absent
route belongs to a coherent discovery category
known technical terms are allowed only when they are contextualized

acceptedRoutes.title: Kikokotoo Gharama za Ujenzi kwa m2 | AfroTools
acceptedRoutes.description: Kadiria gharama za ujenzi kwa eneo, bei kwa mita ya mraba, akiba ya dharura na VAT kwa upangaji wa awali.
acceptedRoutes.acceptedReason: passes Wave 6 stricter screen: indexable, resolves, canonical/meta present, practical Swahili copy, coherent construction/property category, and English-only app/source links are either absent or labeled
